name: @scopai/core
description: Shared core for scopai: database, config, types, utilities

scripts.build: tsc && tsup src/index.ts --format cjs --out-dir dist --external duckdb --minify && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.copyFileSync('src/db/schema.sql','dist/schema.sql');fs.mkdirSync('dist/strategies/built-in',{recursive:true});require('fs').readdirSync('src/strategies/built-in').forEach(f=>{if(f.endsWith('.json'))fs.copyFileSync('src/strategies/built-in/'+f,'dist/strategies/built-in/'+f)})"
